narrative:
Hill 4-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,520 registered voters, with 59.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.6 percentage points.
